name: Long-horizon delayed lethal 001
objective: Create a future lethal window instead of forcing low-quality damage immediately.

avoid: using the last pressure card before lethal is available

successConditions: Player 0 creates lethal pressure by the next battle phase.
failureConditions: Player 0 deals minor damage but loses the future lethal setup.
notes: Tests transition from setup to lethal.

scoring.rationale: Rewards building and converting a delayed lethal line.
